Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8055 "ROLLOVERTURE-C000-8055" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rolloverture (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C000 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
Also made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 1 to return to the title screen from the game over screen:
1. Patched the JSR $886E instruction at $8CF3 to be JSR $C100 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $C100 to check if the fire button in port 1 is pressed at the same time as $25 = $20 (meaning on the game over screen). If so, then it balances the stack and jumps tp $8055 to restart the game. If not pressed, the routine then JSR's to $8863 to carry on the normal code flow. 3. The LDA #$FB at $81CC was changed to LDA #$20 instead, which is used to set the line to trigger the raster IRQ on ($D012). This was to remove a possible IRQ deadlock issue when returning to the title screen.
